# Agent Features Health

## Check API Key Status

```bash qmd:name=check-api-key
curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/agents/status | jq
```

## All Feature Endpoints

```bash qmd:name=full-health
echo "=== Advisor Stats ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/advisor/stats | jq '{total, model_pairs: (.model_pairs | length), success_rate}'

echo ""
echo "=== Managed Agents ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/agents/status | jq

echo ""
echo "=== Codex Stats ==="
curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/codex/stats | jq '{total, projects: (.projects | length), success_rate}'
```

## Advisor + Codex Combined Scan

```bash qmd:name=full-scan
echo "Scanning advisor usages..."
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/api/advisor/scan | jq '{scanned: .scanned}'

echo "Scanning codex usages..."
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/api/codex/scan | jq '{scanned: .scanned}'
```
